recent_v2_activity.title: feat(model-selector-v2): build v2 model selector on new data/UI stack
recent_v2_activity.author: zhangjiadi225
recent_v2_activity.description: New standalone ModelSelectorV2 with Popover UX, virtualized grouped list, keyboard nav, search, tag filters, pin toggle. Built on DataApi + Preference. Shadcn + Tailwind.

recent_v2_activity.title: refactor(data-api): use greedy :uniqueModelId* for model route
recent_v2_activity.author: DeJeune
recent_v2_activity.description: Fixed composite model IDs containing '/' (OpenRouter/Fireworks/Qwen) by using greedy route param
